# Adebukola Akanji

> Portfolio of Adebukola Akanji, a Fintech Product Manager specialising in cross-border payments and emerging markets expansion across Africa and Europe.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Introduction and featured work.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Fintech and payments case studies.
- [About](/about): Background, approach, and values.
- [Resume](/resume): Professional experience and skills.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.

## Case Studies

- [DRC Payments](/drc-payments): Nomba's first international expansion into DRC.
- [Global Expansion](/global-expansion): Scaling Nomba across six markets for diaspora customers.
- [Global Transfers](/global-transfers): Cross-border payment infrastructure for DRC businesses.
- [Gamification](/gamification): BNPL retention through behavioural incentives.
- [Multi-Currency Wallet](/multi-currency-wallet): Nomba's multi-currency wallet product.
